meaning: adj.亲神经的,嗜神经组织的
examples: Conclusion: It is suggested that NMDA has neurotropic and neuroprotective effects on CGC culture.
Recent evidence from the United States also suggests a higher risk of neurotropic disease in older vaccinees.
Objective to evaluate the neurotropic effects of nerve growth factor (NGF) and regeneration chamber fluid (RCF) on the cultured nerve tissue.
